_meta.schema: core.schemas.Estimate (with line_items=list[CostLine] populated from takeoff items pre-pricing)
_meta.note_on_shape: This file uses the CostLine shape pre-populated with quantity=null/unit=<TBD> as a skeleton. After F1 (CWICR cost-DB) lands and quantities are filled in from the Carr EFA drawings, the estimator can price this directly via core.estimator.price_takeoff (after coercing the null quantities to floats).
_meta.owner: Angelo State University (member of the Texas Tech University System)
_meta.owner_pm: Samuel Guevara, ASU Facilities Planning & Construction
_meta.owner_fp_c_director: Tracie Howell, Director of Facilities Planning and Construction
_meta.location: Carr Education and Fine Arts Building, ASU Station #10924, San Angelo, TX 76909 (Tom Green County)
_meta.region_multiplier_note: Tom Green County / San Angelo typically clears at ~0.88-0.93 of the national RSMeans City Cost Index — slightly below US average due to lower labor cost and lower material logistics cost. Carry 1.0 until confirmed with current RSMeans CCI lookup for San Angelo 76909. Apply Tom Green County prevailing wage as the labor floor per prevailing-wages.md.
_meta.contingency_pct_note: Higher than the TAMU sibling bid's 7% because (1) Carr EFA is older with higher existing-conditions risk, (2) the owner-furnished scope demarcation introduces coordination risk, (3) site walk hasn't happened, (4) hazmat survey isn't in hand. Bump to 12% if drawings prove thin or site walk reveals existing-conditions surprises.
_meta.profit_pct_note: Institutional TX state-work norm. Drop to 5% if pricing competitiveness is the differentiating factor; raise to 7% if a strong past-performance / HSP narrative gives us margin headroom.
_meta.owner_furnished_allowance_note: Per Attachment A — the $25,000 cash/contingency allowance for unforeseen scope. Carried as a SEPARATE line on the proposal form; NOT rolled into the base price; NOT marked up.
_meta.assumed_dressing_room_area_basis: RFCSP scope description suggests multi-room dressing-room suite. Working assumption: 2,500 SF (range 2,000-3,000 SF). Verify against drawings.
owner_furnished_scope_excluded_from_pric: Fire suppression system (sprinkler heads, FP main, FP shutdown coordination)
Technology systems (AV, classroom AV, performer comm)
Network / data cabling and termination (pathway IS in our scope; cable + jack + termination are NOT)
Equipment install (any equipment installed in dressing rooms post-construction)
Furniture / FF&E (makeup chairs, costume racks, lockers if applicable)
CBORD access-control devices (readers, controllers, electric strikes) — door prep + pathway + power IS in our scope; the devices themselves are NOT
_meta.fill_instructions: Each item below has quantity=null and unit set per the cost-DB convention. When drawings arrive: (1) replace quantity with the measured number, (2) verify unit matches the cost-DB unit (mismatches will be suppressed per CALIBRATION_REPORT v3 fix C), (3) update source_sheet_ids with the drawing sheet that backs the takeoff, (4) re-run core.estimator.price_takeoff or hand-price each line. Items tagged 'owner_furnished: true' in notes have quantity=null and unit_cost=0.0 by design — they exist for completeness and audit but should remain at zero.

line_items.description: General conditions / project supervision (PM + super for 124-day window)
line_items.notes: [TBD ~4 MO from 7/1 NTP to 11/2 substantial completion] Seed $12,000/mo; bump for active performing-arts building coordination overhead.

line_items.description: Temporary facilities and controls (dumpster, dust containment w/ negative-air, walk-off mats, portable toilet)
line_items.notes: [TBD 1 LS] Seed $6,500; bump to $10K-$15K for active performing-arts building with negative-air containment + sound mitigation.

line_items.description: Material testing / independent inspection (typically owner-paid for renovation this size; confirm)
line_items.notes: [TBD] Confirm against RFCSP body whether material testing is owner-paid (TTUS typical) or GC-paid. If GC-paid, carry $2,500-$5,000 allowance.

line_items.description: Project closeout — O&M manuals, attic stock, owner training, record drawings
line_items.notes: [TBD 1 LS] Included in Div 01 GCs above OR carry as separate line for visibility (~$3,500-$6,500).

line_items.description: Selective interior demolition (existing finishes, casework, ceilings, walls, MEP terminations)
line_items.notes: [TBD ~2,500 SF] Seed DB $4.50/SF is for plain finish demo; complete-MEP-included strip in active building runs $8-$14/SF. Includes after-hours premium for active performing-arts building.

line_items.description: Demo of existing HVAC, plumbing, electrical rough-ins (separate from finish demo)
line_items.notes: [TBD ~2,500 SF] MEP demo typically by MEP subs in coordination with demo sub; carry $3-$6/SF or roll into MEP sub scope.

line_items.description: Hazmat abatement allowance (lead, asbestos, PCBs) — pending ASU EHS survey
line_items.notes: [TBD: $0 if EHS survey clears OR $10K-$25K allowance] Carr EFA is older — assume some VCT/mastic risk until survey returns. Disclose in proposal Assumptions & Clarifications. May also be funded from the $25K cash/contingency allowance.

line_items.description: Existing brick wall restoration — clean, repoint, seal
line_items.notes: [TBD] RFCSP lists 'brick' as wall finish. Working assumption: existing exposed brick gets clean/repoint/seal. Carry $18-$35/SF allowance. Reconfirm against drawings — if new brick veneer is required instead, retag.

line_items.description: Wall blocking for wall-mounted accessories (mirrors, costume rack mounts, ADA grab bars, CBORD reader backing)
line_items.notes: [TBD] Small allowance — typical 50-150 SF of 2x or PT plywood blocking. Note seed unit is SF; if drawings call out per-mount EA, convert before pricing.

line_items.description: Finish carpentry — door + window trim, base trim, wall accent trim (paint-grade)
line_items.notes: [TBD: LF] Carry $12-$22/LF for paint-grade MDF or wood trim installed. Seed DB 06 10 00 is rough framing — wrong category for finish trim.

line_items.description: Millwork — makeup vanities, counters, mirror surrounds (theater-grade with LED-lit mirror frames), costume storage shelving
line_items.notes: [TBD: LF + EA] Seed DB $425/LF is for general millwork; theater dressing-room makeup vanities with LED-lit mirrors run $400-$700/LF. Long lead time (10-14 weeks); see R-17.

line_items.description: Hollow metal frame replacement at dressing-room entries
line_items.notes: [TBD 4-8 EA] Some doors may stay if existing condition permits; confirm against door schedule.

line_items.description: Solid-core wood door at each dressing-room entry
line_items.notes: [TBD 4-8 EA] Pair with HM frame above.

line_items.description: Sargent cylindrical lockset (Sargent specified by name); ANSI Grade 1, US26D
line_items.notes: [TBD 4-8 EA] Seed DB $425/EA is light for Sargent at institutional spec — carry $500-$700/EA. Confirm series (7/10/11-Line) and finish against hardware schedule. Long lead time possible (8-14 weeks); see R-16.

line_items.description: Door hardware accessories (closers, kick plates, silencers, thresholds, stops) per ADA + TTUS standard set
line_items.notes: [TBD 4-8 EA sets] Carry $250-$450/EA set depending on hardware spec.

line_items.description: CBORD-prep at each door — electric-strike mortise in frame + low-voltage conduit & ring & string to plenum (devices owner-furnished)
line_items.notes: [TBD: EA per CBORD-controlled door] Owner-furnishes the electric strike + reader. We furnish: frame prep, conduit, ring & string, 120V at reader (or PoE pathway if CBORD spec is PoE). Carry $350-$650/EA for prep + low-voltage pathway. Coordinate with CBORD admin (R-06).

line_items.description: Metal-stud framing for any new partitions or furring (at existing brick + at door reinforcement)
line_items.notes: [TBD: SF of new partition face area] Likely some new partitions to delineate dressing-room layouts + furring at existing brick where applicable.

line_items.description: 5/8" Type-X GWB on framing (moisture-resistant in wet zones if showers present); both faces of new partitions
line_items.notes: [TBD: SF, both faces if both sides finished] Quantity = 2 × partition LF × height for both faces of any new partition; + 1× LF × height for furring at brick (single face).

line_items.description: Acoustical ceiling tile — 2x4 (or 2x2) lay-in grid + tile
line_items.notes: [TBD ~2,000 SF] Full ceiling replacement assumed; verify against RCP. Wet zones (showers if any) likely get GWB ceiling instead.

line_items.description: Sheet vinyl with heat-welded seams — primary dressing-room flooring (slip-resistant, theater-friendly)
line_items.notes: [TBD ~2,000 SF] No cost-DB hit. Carry $8-$12/SF allowance for heat-welded sheet vinyl. Confirm against finish schedule.

line_items.description: LVT in adjacent circulation / vestibule areas (if applicable)
line_items.notes: [TBD] Confirm if there are non-dressing-room areas in scope; otherwise zero.

line_items.description: Ceramic / porcelain tile in wet zones (shower stalls + walls) — if showers present
line_items.notes: [TBD] No cost-DB hit. If showers in scope: floor tile $18-$30/SF + wall tile $14-$22/SF installed; plus waterproofing membrane $4-$7/SF.

line_items.description: Resilient base — 4" rubber, integral or cove
line_items.notes: [TBD: LF of room perimeter + casework toe-kick] Roughly perimeter ~250-350 LF for a 2,500 SF multi-room suite.

line_items.description: Interior painting — walls + ceilings (where GWB) + door frames (2-coat institutional latex, low-VOC)
line_items.notes: [TBD: SF of paint surface] Quantity = wall LF × ceiling height + soffit/ceiling SF where GWB + door-frame allowance. Theater dressing rooms sometimes carry specific paint color/sheen specifications.

line_items.description: Room signage — ADA-compliant interior identification (raised characters + Braille)
line_items.notes: [TBD 4-8 EA] Per ASU/TTUS wayfinding standard.

line_items.description: Toilet accessories — grab bars, paper holders, ADA mirrors, soap dispensers (if dressing rooms include private toilets)
line_items.notes: [TBD 0-4 sets per toilet] Confirm against fixture schedule.

line_items.description: Fire extinguishers + recessed cabinets (per code, 1 per 75 ft travel distance)
line_items.notes: [TBD 2-3 EA] Carry $350-$650/EA for FE + cabinet installed.

line_items.description: Lockers / costume storage (if in dressing-room scope)
line_items.notes: [OWNER-FURNISHED per RFCSP if listed under 'furniture' — DO NOT PRICE] Carry zero; coordinate install access only. Confirm against owner-furnished list.

line_items.description: Sprinkler-head relocation + FP main modifications
line_items.notes: [OWNER-FURNISHED per RFCSP — DO NOT PRICE] FP is owner-furnished on this project. Carry zero. Coordinate access only. Reconfirm in writing with Samuel (R-02).

line_items.description: Plumbing fixture — ADA wall-hung lavatory with sensor or lever faucet (full rough-in + set)
line_items.notes: [TBD 2-4 EA] Seed DB $1,850/EA is realistic for ADA wall-hung lav incl. rough.

line_items.description: Plumbing fixture — ADA water closet (floor-mounted or wall-hung), if private toilets in scope
line_items.notes: [TBD 0-4 EA] Confirm against fixture schedule.

line_items.description: ADA-compliant shower stall (60x36 transfer or roll-in with seat) + thermostatic mixing valve, if showers in scope
line_items.notes: [TBD 0-4 EA] No cost-DB hit. Carry $4,500-$7,500/EA installed.

line_items.description: Domestic water piping (per fixture allowance) — supply, waste, vent rough-in
line_items.notes: [TBD: match fixture count] Coordinate with existing risers.

line_items.description: HVAC system replacement — air handler / VAV + new ductwork + diffusers/grilles + controls
line_items.notes: [TBD ~2,500 SF served] Seed DB $22.50/SF is light for full system replacement; bump to $30-$45/SF for full replacement of an existing renovation HVAC system in an active building.

line_items.description: Dressing-room exhaust (hair/makeup chemical vapors — higher ACH than standard back-of-house)
line_items.notes: [TBD: EA exhaust fans + LF exhaust duct] Carry $1,500-$3,500/EA for dedicated exhaust fan + duct to roof.

line_items.description: Test, adjust, balance (TAB) report — independent agency
line_items.notes: [TBD 1 LS] Typical TTUS UGSC requirement; $3,500-$8,500 range for this size of system.

line_items.description: Branch wiring + devices (receptacles, switches, GFCI in wet zones, dedicated 20A at makeup stations)
line_items.notes: [TBD ~2,500 SF] Includes power for owner-furnished CBORD readers (120V or PoE pathway) + AV equipment locations.

line_items.description: Lighting — theater-grade LED fixtures with dimming + makeup-mirror lighting + egress / emergency lighting
line_items.notes: [TBD ~25 fixtures from RCP + 4-8 makeup-mirror surrounds] Seed DB $285/EA is light for theater-grade dimmable LED; carry $350-$650/EA. Mirror-frame lighting may be priced in Div 06 millwork.

line_items.description: Lighting controls — occupancy + manual override + dimming
line_items.notes: [TBD] Per ASU/TTUS standard. Carry $1,500-$3,500/room.

line_items.description: Sub-panel for dressing-room loads (if existing panel insufficient)
line_items.notes: [TBD 0-1 EA] Carry $5,500-$8,500/EA for institutional 200A sub-panel. Seed DB 26 24 16 ($2,400) is residential-spec — under-sized for institutional.

line_items.description: Low-voltage pathway — conduit + J-boxes + ring & string for owner-furnished data / AV / CBORD cabling
line_items.notes: [TBD: # outlets] No cost-DB hit. Carry $125-$250/EA for pathway only. CABLE + TERMINATION are owner-furnished — do NOT price.

line_items.description: AV / data cabling + termination + jack
line_items.notes: [OWNER-FURNISHED per RFCSP — DO NOT PRICE] ASU's cabling vendor handles cable + termination. We provide pathway only (line above).

line_items.description: Fire-alarm device relocation (strobe, smoke detector) — incidental to ceiling demo
line_items.notes: [TBD 4-10 EA] Coordinate shutdown with ASU EHS; per-device install ~$350-$650.

line_items.description: CBORD access-control readers, controllers, electric strikes
line_items.notes: [OWNER-FURNISHED per RFCSP — DO NOT PRICE] We provide door prep + low-voltage pathway + 120V (see Div 08 CBORD-prep line + Div 26 power line). The devices themselves are owner-furnished, owner-installed.

_unsuppressed_summary.note: Subtotal / contingency / overhead / profit / grand_total all currently $0 because every line is at quantity=null and unit_cost=0. Once quantities are filled from drawings and the cost-DB lookup runs, the model_dump shape will match exports/calibration_v3/estimate.json. The owner-furnished lines (FP, CBORD devices, AV/data cable, FF&E lockers) should remain at quantity=0 / unit_cost=0 in the final estimate.
